name: Itron Smart Grid & Meter Data API
what_it_does: Itron REST API for smart meter data management, advanced metering infrastructure (AMI), and grid intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage meter data collection and validation from AMI networks for utility meter operations, handle interval data and time-of-use consumption analytics for utility billing automation, access demand response and load control event management for grid optimization, retrieve outage detection and restoration event data from smart meters for grid operations, manage revenue protection and meter tamper detection data for utility security, handle over-the-air (OTA) meter firmware management for AMI network operations, access customer engagement and energy insight data for utility customer programs, retrieve grid edge device management and network operations data for AMI network management, manage water and gas meter data for multi-utility smart meter programs, and integrate Itron meter data with CIS, billing, and grid management platforms.
use_cases: Collecting interval meter data from AMI integration agents
Managing demand response from grid optimization agents
Detecting outages from smart grid monitoring agents
Analyzing consumption from energy analytics agents
not_for: Non-utility applications without meter data and smart grid context
Consumer energy apps without utility AMI infrastructure access
best_when: A utility with Itron AMI infrastructure wants AI agents to automate meter data collection, demand response management, outage detection, revenue protection, and energy analytics.
avoid_when: GRID SECURITY RISK: Itron AMI network automation involves critical infrastructure — automated firmware updates, demand response dispatch, or load control commands must have safety validation and rollback capability. NERC CIP critical infrastructure protection standards apply to grid operations automation. Interval meter data sharing is regulated by state PUC privacy rules; automated data sharing without consent framework creates regulatory exposure. OTA meter firmware automation requires extensive testing before network-wide deployment.

auth.notes: Itron uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.itron.com. Webhooks for meter and grid events. REST API with JSON. Liberty Lake, Washington HQ. Public (ITRI NASDAQ). Founded 1977. 8,000+ utility customers in 100+ countries. Itron manufactures smart meters and provides AMI software (OpenWay Riva platform). Acquired Silver Spring Networks (2018) for IoT grid intelligence. Competes with Landis+Gyr, Sensus (Xylem), and Neptune for smart meter and AMI market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-meter and annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per meter point; AMI network services
pricing.notes: Liberty Lake, Washington. Itron (ITRI NASDAQ). Founded 1977. 8,000+ utility customers. Itron OpenWay Riva is AMI platform. Silver Spring Networks acquisition (2018) adds IoT grid. Competes with Landis+Gyr and Sensus for global smart meter and AMI market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; volume per utility deployment

known_agent_gotchas: GRID SECURITY RISK: Itron AMI is critical infrastructure; automated demand response and load control commands require safety validation and NERC CIP security controls
NERC CIP compliance — grid operations automation must meet NERC CIP-007 (system security management) and CIP-010 (configuration management) requirements
Interval data privacy — state PUC rules restrict automated sharing of 15/30-minute interval data; California SB 1 and similar rules require consent for third-party sharing
OTA firmware automation — automated meter firmware updates across large AMI networks require staged rollout and rollback capability; mass firmware failure can disable meter reading capability
Meter commissioning workflow — new meter activation requires commissioning sequence (register, test, commission); automated meter activation without commissioning creates billing errors
Silver Spring Networks IoT integration — Itron's IoT grid intelligence (Silver Spring acquisition) uses different API surface from traditional Itron meter data APIs; verify product integration path
agent_readiness.security_notes: Smart meter/AMI. SOC2, NERC-CIP. OAuth2. US/EU. Critical grid and meter consumption data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Smart meter critical infrastructure. SOC2, NERC-CIP. OAuth2. US/EU. Grid and meter data.
